query: SELECT id, name, plot_number, area_code, permitted_use, bua, gfa_sqft, manual_bua_sqft, land_price, agent_commission_land_pct, estimated_construction_price_per_sqft, design_fee_pct, supervision_fee_pct, sales_commission_pct, marketing_pct, developer_fee_pct, separation_fee_per_m2, soil_test_fee, topographic_survey_fee, rera_unit_reg_fee, developer_noc_fee, escrow_account_fee, bank_fees, community_fees, surveyor_fees, rera_audit_report_fee, rera_inspection_report_fee, rera_project_reg_fee, official_bodies_fees, gfa_residential_sqft, gfa_retail_sqft, gfa_offices_sqft FROM projects WHERE name LIKE '%6185392%' LIMIT 3;
